_note: Human-verified prices ($/MTok). Priority 200 — beats ALL automated sources. Format matches pricing.json v7.0. Never edit without visiting the official URL and confirming the price yourself.
_workflow: Discrepancy found? 1) Visit official_url  2) Confirm price  3) Add entry here  4) Commit

deepseek-chat._notes: deepseek-chat = DeepSeek-V3.2 (non-thinking). Official: $0.028 cache-hit input, $0.28 cache-miss input, $0.42 output.

deepseek-reasoner._notes: deepseek-reasoner = DeepSeek-V3.2 (thinking mode). Same pricing as deepseek-chat.
